name: Dexie.js (IndexedDB Wrapper)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache 2.0); David Fahlander; Dexie Cloud is paid

auth.notes: Browser IndexedDB; Dexie Cloud uses OAuth for sync

performance.notes: Near-native IndexedDB speed; minimal abstraction overhead

agent_readiness.notes: The most popular IndexedDB wrapper. db.version(1).stores({friends: '++id, name, age'}). db.friends.add({name: 'Alice'}). db.friends.where('age').above(18).toArray(). Promise-based. TypeScript support. Live queries: useLiveQuery() React hook. Compound indexes. Bulk operations. Transactions. Dexie Cloud for sync. React/Vue/Svelte adapters. Simpler than raw IndexedDB; more features than idb. Local-first app database standard.

gotchas: IndexedDB storage limits vary by browser (50MB-unlimited)
Private browsing mode clears IndexedDB on session end
Dexie Cloud sync is a separate paid product
best_when: React/Vue apps needing local database with live queries
PWAs requiring persistent client-side data storage
Applications syncing with Dexie Cloud or custom backend
avoid_when: Server-side Node.js applications (use better-sqlite3 or postgres)
When PouchDB sync with CouchDB needed
summary: Dexie.js is the most popular IndexedDB wrapper for browser-based offline-first applications. db.friends.where('age').above(18).toArray(). Promise/async API. useLiveQuery() React hook for reactive queries. TypeScript-first. Bulk operations and transactions. Schema versioning. The standard choice for local-first web apps. Dexie Cloud (paid) adds multi-device sync.
